meaning: n.杈炲幓(鑱屽姟)v.杈炲幓,杈炶亴
examples: He ought to resign, I think.
He was under strong pressure to resign.
An alternative way to maximize shareholder value: Kill the sale and force Durrett to resign.
Pressure started growing on Mr Teixeira to resign after new corruption allegations surfaced earlier this month.
